description: Artifact/task/reviewer/validator registry for the migrated 0-14 pipeline.

tasks.description: Import concept artifacts when provided, otherwise use the current project design document.
Generate design source manifest, extraction, option coverage, project selections, open questions, scope catalog, and phase map.

schema_refs.description: Concrete interpretation of the initial project intent.
Current draft/session project identity and isolation signature.
Initial Project DNA seed. Step03+ must not consume this seed directly.
Initial normalized open questions contract.
Initial project specificity and template leakage score report.

tasks.description: Import gameplay framework history when provided or reference validated stage 00 outputs.
Generate gameplay framework, core loop, system boundary, full feature scope, implementation phase map, system relation graph, and resource flow graph.

schema_refs.description: Concrete player actions, feedback loop, progression, scene, and runtime data requirements.
Detected archetype/subtype requirements for playable completeness.
Archetype-specific open questions after gameplay framework extraction.
Archetype detection signals and fallback status.
Gameplay framework specificity and archetype confidence report.

tasks.description: Import subsystem designs.
Import AI design script.
Import frozen design and development design artifacts.
Generate frozen design summary, playable contracts, freeze contract, scope decisions, phase backlog, design review report, and repair patch record.

schema_refs.description: Core playable runtime contract.
First playable demo flow contract.
Runtime data tables required by the playable flow.
UI screens, controls, bindings, and checks required by the playable flow.
Scene bootstrap requirements for the first playable scene.
Required asset paths, consumers, mount points, and fallbacks.
Placeholder-only audio event requirements for later AI audio generation.
Playable demo acceptance checks.
AI-assisted design completeness review report.
Frozen Project DNA contract consumed by Step03+.
First playable scenario and acceptance flow derived from Project DNA.
Required semantic coverage seed before program/art coverage is evaluated.
Frozen design specificity score and blocking summary.

tasks.description: Import program requirements when provided or generate them from the frozen traced design.
Generate systems, entities, contracts, acceptance criteria, structure spec, program requirements contract, and traceability matrix.

schema_refs.description: Program requirements derived from frozen playable contracts for runtime, UI, scene, input, objective, data, and test systems.
Trace review for program requirements.
Allowed roots, system path map, and path binding contract for development planning.
Project DNA runtime semantics converted into implementable program capabilities.
Program semantic coverage report before program review.
Program requirements specificity score.

tasks.description: Import art requirements or record missing source artifact.
Generate source-traced art requirement documents, asset registry, structure spec, drift analysis, and art requirements contract.

schema_refs.description: Consumable Unity asset specifications derived from art requirements.
Art requirements and asset production contract derived from frozen playable contracts.
Source-traced consumable asset registry.
Resolved mapping from playable asset contracts to Unity asset targets.
Unity mount points, import settings, fallback policies, and acceptance checks.
Placeholder-only audio plan for later AI audio replacement.
Consumable image asset contract with Unity target path and fallback policy.
UI sprite slicing metadata contract. Python emits metadata; Unity performs slicing.
Unity import root, import settings, and optional Addressables policy.
Initial asset-to-program binding seed generated from playable contracts.
Empty audio placeholder requirements for future audio AI replacement.
Project-specific art taxonomy derived from Project DNA and archetype requirements.
Asset strategy matrix binding core semantics to Unity asset targets.
Art requirements specificity score.

tasks.description: Import program review or record missing source artifact.
Review generated program requirements for blockers, warnings, weak relations, missing items, and plan readiness.

schema_refs.description: AI-assisted program requirements review report.
Semantic review for Project DNA consumption and program coverage.
Program review specificity score.

tasks.description: Import art review or record missing source artifact.
Review generated art requirements and asset registry for blockers and traceability.

schema_refs.description: AI-assisted art requirements review report.
Semantic art review report covering asset roles, mount readiness, UI consumption, and rework needs.
Art review specificity score.

tasks.description: Reference art review outputs and asset requirements as style context.
Generate art style options, image previews, and generation logs.
Score style options and mark the recommended default option.
Check whether the art style gate is enabled, skipped, or awaiting operator approval.
Persist the selected style option and operator notes in the same stage.

schema_refs.description: Concrete style constraints for production asset generation.
Style compatibility report against archetype readability requirements.
Human style risk acknowledgement and override record.
Style generation specificity score.

tasks.description: Import program plans or record missing source artifact.
Generate program task breakdown, typed playable contract tasks, phase task map, build config, config schema, and plan files.

schema_refs.description: Program development plan contract with task outputs and source contracts.
Summary of typed development tasks generated from playable contracts.
Task traceability and contract completeness review report.
Scene roots, camera, UI roots, input roots, and visible object requirements for Step13.
UI screens and runtime binding tasks for Step11 and Step13.
Input actions and InputRouter runtime task requirements.
Objective tracking and completion requirements for playable flow.
Executable program task breakdown with semantic references.
Program task coverage matrix for required capabilities.
Program plan specificity score.

tasks.description: Import art plans or record missing source artifact.
Generate art plan index, art task breakdown, and art structure spec using confirmed style.

schema_refs.description: Art production tasks bound to consumable asset specs.
Art task breakdown with source semantic roles.
Art task coverage matrix for required asset strategy roles.
Art plan specificity score.

tasks.description: Import asset alignment or record missing source artifact.
Generate asset alignment protocol, program/art asset lists, dependency graph, gap analysis, and alignment matrix.

schema_refs.description: Program-to-art asset alignment report consumed by development execution and scene assembly.
Consumable Unity mount readiness summary consumed by art production and scene assembly.
Final semantic alignment report across Project DNA, program tasks, and art tasks.
Final semantic coverage matrix consumed by later implementation stages.
Asset alignment specificity score.

tasks.description: Import development execution or record missing source artifact.
Generate traced development execution records from program plan tasks.

schema_refs.description: Structured development execution report with execution object states and blockers.
Project-save scoped execution object workflow store.

tasks.description: Import art production or record missing source artifact.
Generate traced art production records from art plan tasks, confirmed style, and placeholder-only audio requirements.

schema_refs.description: Structured art production report listing produced and missing consumable assets.
Runtime record of generated empty audio placeholder files.
Raw image generation intake and availability manifest.
Technical image quality report with format, alpha, and fallback status.
Semantic consumability review and human review queue seed.
Blocking and non-blocking art rework queue.
Processed asset manifest. Python does not crop or slice pixels.
Sprite slice metadata for Unity TextureImporter.
Per-asset Unity TextureImporter and asset importer settings.
Sprite atlas packing plan for Unity.
Optional Addressables plan. Non-blocking unless the Unity package is enabled.
UGUI prefab contract generated from UI asset tasks.
Unity Editor request payload for UGUI prefab generation.
Final mount manifest consumed by scene assembly.
Preflight report for program-to-art binding readiness.
Strong handoff gate consumed by Step13 Unity materialization.
Project-save scoped execution object workflow store.

tasks.description: Import optional scene assembly instructions or use the generated runtime intent contract.
Create a visible Unity demo scene, runtime bootstrap, BuildSettings entry, smoke test record, and scene assembly execution object.

schema_refs.description: Structured scene assembly report with static playable structure and source contract summary.
Structured development execution report with execution object states and blockers.
Structured art production report listing produced and missing consumable assets.
Runtime record of generated empty audio placeholder files.
Strong art handoff gate consumed by scene assembly.
Mount manifest consumed by Unity scene assembly.
Two-phase Unity Editor compile and execute request.
Unity art import materialization report.
Unity UGUI prefab generation report.
Program-to-art binding contract after Unity materialization.
Scene mount and visible content report.
Project-save scoped execution object workflow store.

tasks.description: Import integration validation or record missing source artifact.
Validate development execution, art production, scene assembly, automated test records, and issue fix log.

schema_refs.description: Layered playable integration validation report.
Layered playmode and environment validation results.
Art handoff, import, prefab, and scene mount acceptance report.
Structured playable acceptance report with validation levels.
Structured scene assembly report consumed by playable validation.
Unity art import report consumed by art acceptance.
Unity prefab generation report consumed by art acceptance.
Unity scene mount report consumed by art acceptance.
Art handoff gate consumed by integration validation.
Playable acceptance checks required for integration validation.
Structured art production report listing produced and missing consumable assets.
Runtime record of generated empty audio placeholder files.
Project-save scoped execution object workflow store.
